seo.meta_description: Move fast without breaking content. Acme Platform for startups.

hero.headline: Move fast without breaking content
hero.sub_headline: A generous free tier, instant API access, and SDKs in every language — so your team can ship day one.

features.title: 5-Minute Setup
features.description: Create a stack, define your first content type, and fetch content via API — all in under five minutes.

features.title: Generous Free Tier
features.description: Up to 5 users, 5,000 entries, and 1TB bandwidth per month — enough for most startups well past Series A.

features.title: Framework Agnostic
features.description: Official SDKs for JavaScript, Python, Ruby, Java, and .NET. Starters for Next.js, Nuxt, Gatsby, and Astro.

cta_banner.heading: Get started in minutes
cta_banner.body_text: No credit card required. No sales call needed.
